title: Phase 1/2 + cannotCalculateChanges worth defending
description: Phase 1 (collect+validate) / Phase 2 (atomic write) split for both contact_set and space_set is the right pattern. A future contributor might suggest 'validate and write in one pass' for simplicity — that reintroduces the atomicity violation where an early write persists even when a later field fails validation. The cannotCalculateChanges return from /changes endpoints is correct: without a change log, enumerating deltas is impossible and lying (returning all current IDs as 'created') would be worse for clients.
close_reason: Fixed: description type check in create branch + test; decision record filed
